svg.title: PhantomRed autonomous recon pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Five-stage pipeline: passive enumeration to DNS validation to live host probing to vulnerability scanning to content discovery, with tool labels and flow arrows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about passive subdomain enumeration')
sendPrompt('How does DNS validation work in recon pipelines?')
g.text: dnsx · resolves A records · flags dangling CNAMEs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does httpx do in a recon pipeline?')
g.text: httpx · HTTP/HTTPS probe · tech fingerprint · status codes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Nuclei templates should I run on live hosts?')
sendPrompt('How does FFUF content discovery work after recon?')
sendPrompt('How do I triage findings from Nuclei and FFUF?')
g.text: jq · severity sort · diff vs previous run

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a final recon report look like?')
